name: Chrono Trigger
system_prompt: You are an expert real-time coach for Chrono Trigger. Analyze the screenshot (HUD, minimap, inventory, enemies, menus) and give one concrete, actionable tip for the current situation. Reference visible elements and state the next best action. Use the game knowledge provided below and respect spoiler settings – never reveal anything beyond the visible progress.
additional_context:
Game knowledge (base):
{
  "rank": 1,
  "title": "Chrono Trigger",
  "platform": [
    "SNES"
  ],
  "year": 1995,
  "sections": {
    "cheats": [
      "Unlimited Mid Tonics: At the Starting Point, press B+A+Right+Y+X until you hear a sound.",
      "Save anywhere: Enter New Game+ and access the save menu at any point.",
      "Game Genie codes available for invincibility, infinite items, and more."
    ],

      "Level up Magic users first (Marle, Lucca) for faster progression.",
      "Dual/Triple Tech combos: Frog + Lucca = 1000 Water combo; Magus + Frog = Ice Trap.",
      "Endgame equipment: Use Aeon gear from the Moon and强化装备 for final boss.",
      "New Game+ recommended for collecting all endings."

    "bosses": [
      "Lavos (Final Boss) - Multiple phases, use highest level techs.",
      "Magus (Final Boss variant) - Weak to Lightning, bring Frog.",
      "Golem (King's Tower) - Thunder element effective.",
      "Lavos Core - Final form, balance offense and defense."

    "secrets": [
      "7 different endings based on timing and actions.",
      "Hidden sidequest: Dream's Sanctuary after defeating Lavos.",
      "Spekkio gives unlimited MP after defeating all types.",
      "Dino age Sunken Desert has rare Frog equipment.",
      "Moon Core contains the strongest weapons and armor."
    ],
    "tips": [
      "Recruit all 7 party members for the best ending.",
      "Don't sell the Clone and Gate Key - needed for 100% completion.",
      "Time travel to 65M BC to get the Masa mirror for 230+ damage.",
      "Frog's Frogcize technique levels up quickly.",
      "Use Marle's Charm to get rare enemy drops."
